utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final coverage plan: all five items are present. Next, verify if each item is fully specified with details and costs. (1) health_coverage includes type, features, deductible, limits, monthly cost, etc.—fully specified. (2) property_coverage includes coverage features but lacks any explicit cost element—so not fully specified according to the format which requires 'with costs'. (3) travel_coverage also includes detailed features but no costs—so not fully specified. (4) additional_services lists features but no costs—so not fully specified. (5) total_budget has a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown—fully specified. Thus, 2 items (health_coverage and total_budget) are fully specified with all required details including costs, out of 5 total items.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan contains three major policy areas: health_coverage (named 'LifeFirst Standard + Preventive Care Package7'), property_coverage, and travel_coverage. Based on the ground-truth ratings, the health plan name corresponds to the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health coverage, with additional preventive care features. The preventive care element aligns with 'Preventive Care Package' in health_enhancement_services. For property_coverage, the features (electronics, liability, temporary accommodation, natural disasters) match 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection → home_content. For travel_coverage (medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage, adventure sports, etc.), that feature set corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage → travel_insurance. Therefore, the mapped items and their ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health physical) = 9, LifeFirst Standard Plan (health mental) = 9, Preventive Care Package = 7, LifeFirst Standard Coverage = 9, and LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel) = 9.
